---
id: remove-project-member
title: "Remove a member associated with this project"
description: "This also sets their invite status to `REMOVED`."
sidebar_label: "Remove a member associated with this project"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: reference/openapi/ory-apis
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint"
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails"
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema"
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes"
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs"
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem"
import Heading from "@theme/Heading"
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate"

<Heading as={"h1"} className={"openapi__heading"} children={"Remove a member associated with this project"}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={"delete"} path={"/projects/{project}/members/{member}"} context={"endpoint"}></MethodEndpoint>

This also sets their invite status to `REMOVED`. This endpoint requires the user to be a member of the project with the role
`OWNER`.

<Heading id={"request"} as={"h2"} className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails {...require("./remove-project-member.ParamsDetails.json")}></ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema {...require("./remove-project-member.RequestSchema.json")}></RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes {...require("./remove-project-member.StatusCodes.json")}></StatusCodes>
